execSummary: LinkedIn delivered the highest engagement rate at 6.41%.
Administrative role campaign content improved follower growth across channels.
Average post engagement rate finished at 5.34%, up ▲ 16.9% over last quarter.
LinkedIn contributed the strongest reach while Facebook drove efficient page clicks.

insights.working: Role-specific educational content and recruiter Q&A posts increased saves and comments.
insights.notWorking: Generic office culture posts had lower CTR and fewer shares.
insights.actions: Prioritize operational role highlights and add stronger copy around immediate openings.
insights.next: Launch A/B tests on headline format by role category to improve click intent.
